rationale.R1.6: The text is technically clear but suffers from heavy repetition and conjunction overuse.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is not explicit; the methodology for eliciting confidence scores is not provided.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions or harmful content are introduced in the output.
rationale.RX.5: Only major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not annotated with source and reason.
